glosses.ro: a fi potrivit; a se potrivi
glosses.ja: 適する; 向いている

sentences.target: Diese Schuhe eignen sich für den Regen.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzə ˈʃuːə ˈaɪ̯ɡnən zɪç fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈʁeːɡn̩/

translations.de: Diese Schuhe eignen sich für den Regen.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzə ˈʃuːə ˈaɪ̯ɡnən zɪç fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈʁeːɡn̩/
translations.en: These shoes are good for rain.
translations.es: Estos zapatos van bien para la lluvia.
translations.fr: Ces chaussures vont bien quand il pleut.
translations.it: Queste scarpe vanno bene quando piove.
translations.ko: 이 신발은 비 오는 날에 좋아요.
translations.pt: Estes sapatos são bons para a chuva.
translations.vi: Đôi giày này hợp khi trời mưa.
translations.nl: Deze schoenen zijn geschikt voor de regen.
translations.hi: ये जूते बारिश में अच्छे हैं।
translations.pl: Te buty nadają się na deszcz.
translations.el: Αυτά τα παπούτσια είναι κατάλληλα για τη βροχή.
translations.sv: De här skorna funkar bra i regn.
translations.ro: Acești pantofi sunt potriviți pentru ploaie.
translations.cs: Tyhle boty jsou vhodné do deště.
translations.da: Disse sko er gode til regn.
translations.ja: この靴は雨の日に向いています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner in nominative plural, modifying 'Schuhe'.
Plural common noun functioning as subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Reflexive pronoun required by the verb 'sich eignen'; coreferential with the subject.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces suitability target.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine, modifying 'Regen'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Diese Pfannen eignen sich nicht für Induktion.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzə ˈpfanən ˈaɪ̯ɡnən zɪç nɪçt fyːɐ̯ ɪndʊkˈtsi̯oːn/

translations.de: Diese Pfannen eignen sich nicht für Induktion.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzə ˈpfanən ˈaɪ̯ɡnən zɪç nɪçt fyːɐ̯ ɪndʊkˈtsi̯oːn/
translations.en: These pans aren't good for induction.
translations.es: Estas sartenes no sirven para inducción.
translations.fr: Ces poêles ne sont pas compatibles avec l'induction.
translations.it: Queste padelle non sono compatibili con l'induzione.
translations.ko: 이 프라이팬은 인덕션에서 사용할 수 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些平底锅不适用于电磁炉。
translations.yue: 呢啲鑊唔啱用喺電磁爐上。
translations.ru: Эти сковородки не подходят для индукционных плит.
translations.pt: Estas panelas não são compatíveis com indução.
translations.vi: Những cái chảo này không dùng được với bếp từ.
translations.ar: هذه المقالي لا تعمل على المواقد الحثية.
translations.nl: Deze pannen zijn niet geschikt voor inductie.
translations.uk: Ці пательні не підходять для індукційних плит.
translations.hu: Ezek a serpenyők nem jók indukciós főzőlaphoz.
translations.hi: ये पैन इंडक्शन पर काम नहीं करते।
translations.pl: Te patelnie nie nadają się do indukcji.
translations.el: Αυτά τα τηγάνια δεν είναι κατάλληλα για επαγωγικές εστίες.
translations.nb: Disse pannene er ikke egnet for induksjon.
translations.id: Wajan-wajan ini tidak cocok untuk kompor induksi.
translations.sv: De här pannorna funkar inte på induktion.
translations.ro: Tigăile acestea nu sunt compatibile cu inducția.
translations.cs: Tyhle pánve nejsou vhodné na indukci.
translations.da: Disse pander er ikke egnet til induktion.
translations.ja: このフライパンはIHに対応していません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner in nominative plural, modifying 'Pfannen'.
Plural common noun functioning as subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Reflexive pronoun in the construction 'sich eignen'; coreferential with the subject.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Preposition governing the accusative; marks suitability target.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Die Räume eignen sich zum Lernen.

translations.de: Die Räume eignen sich zum Lernen.
translations.en: The rooms are good for studying.
translations.es: Estas salas son buenas para estudiar.
translations.fr: Ces salles sont bien pour étudier.
translations.it: Queste aule vanno bene per studiare.
translations.pt: Estas salas são boas para estudar.
translations.vi: Những phòng này thích hợp để học.
translations.nl: Deze ruimtes zijn geschikt om te studeren.
translations.hi: ये कमरे पढ़ाई के लिए अच्छे हैं।
translations.pl: Te pomieszczenia nadają się do nauki.
translations.el: Αυτοί οι χώροι είναι κατάλληλοι για διάβασμα.
translations.nb: Disse rommene er fine å studere i.
translations.sv: De här rummen är bra att studera i.
translations.ro: Aceste săli sunt potrivite pentru învățat.
translations.cs: Tyhle místnosti jsou vhodné na učení.
translations.da: Disse lokaler er gode til at studere i.
translations.ja: これらの部屋は勉強に向いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural, modifying 'Räume'.
Plural common noun functioning as subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Reflexive pronoun in the construction 'sich eignen'; coreferential with the subject.
Contraction of 'zu dem'; preposition 'zu' with definite article 'dem' (dative singular), introducing a purpose phrase.
Nominalized verb (gerund-like noun); complement of 'zum' expressing purpose.

translations.en: We're not a good fit for that.
translations.es: No somos la mejor opción para eso.
translations.fr: On n'est pas faits pour ça.
translations.vi: Cái đó không hợp với bọn mình.
translations.hi: ये हमारे लिए ठीक नहीं है।
translations.nb: Det er ikke noe for oss.
translations.da: Det er ikke noget for os.
translations.ja: それは私たちには向いていません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Reflexive pronoun, 1st person plural; required by 'sich eignen', coreferential with 'Wir'.
Pronominal adverb ('da' + 'für'); refers to a previously mentioned thing; marks suitability target.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
